calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shaun Carberry appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mr. Carberry requested a six-week continuance for final distribution stating that he is filing the taxes this week for the sale of the house. Status on close of estate is continued to June 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed by then.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Shaun Carberry appearing in person for Petitioner George Freeman.

Mr. Carberry spoke of steps taken and efforts made in locating heirs. Mr. Carberry also stated that they found no issue of decedents grandparents and that they substantially complied with due diligence. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 26, 2021, is admitted to probate. George Freeman is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for April 09, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
